title: Update Filter UI in Streamlit App to Show Empty Column on Expand
story: As a data analyst using the Streamlit app, I want the filter section to expand showing an empty column without a button so that I can add filters more intuitively.
description: Update the filter UI in the Streamlit app so that expanding the filter section shows an empty column immediately, rather than displaying a button to add a filter. This provides a more direct interaction pattern for adding filter criteria.
acceptance_criteria: Expanding the filter section shows an empty column for input
No separate 'add filter' button is required to begin filtering
ux_changes: Filter section expands to show an empty column ready for input instead of showing a button to add a filter.
